calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Jul-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael McCloskey for and with Eunice Rhodes.

The Court raised the issue of bond and the rental income on the property. Mr. McCloskey stated that the amount of rent is just enough to pay Pg&E and the water bills, that he filed declarations of the two Brothers this morning and that the Brothers were giving power of attorney to Ms. Rhodes to manage the property. The Court granted the Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee (subject to review of the order). Ms. Rhodes can not sell or encumber the property without Court approval.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Jun-15-2011 Continued To Jul-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael McCloskey for Eunice Rhodes.

Mr. McCloskey stated that they have tried to get Betty to sign a declination, that Ms. Mitchell signed the Trust 5 days before her death, that Betty refused to sign any documents and that she will not cooperate. In addition, he stated that Eunice is the beneficial owner of 3 of the 7 shares and that she is managing the property. The Court stated that either a bond was needed or that they could appoint the Trustee without the power of sale. The matter was continued to July 6, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide a declaration regarding their efforts to contact Betty, her failure to respond or step up, the loan totals, and a proposed order by June 29, 2011. Ms. Rhodes is not authorized to take out any loans on the property.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Rob Harris.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar May-25-2011 Continued To Jun-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Continued To May-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Apr-26-2011 Continued To May-10-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Ex Parte Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-14-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael McCluskey for and with Eunice Mitchell.

Mr. McCluskey stated that it took all this time for the petitioner to get a lot of liens removed and to get a loan, that there was an offer that fell apart which gave Ms. Rhodes some breathing room, that Mr. Cunningham stated that there was another offer, that he told Mr. Cunningham he would match that offer, and that he would be heading to Sacramento bankruptcy court for a bidding war. The Court granted the petition appointing the temporary successor trustee (order signed as slightly modified).

Judge: Mary Wiss. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
